brief_notes: Strong logical flow from in vitro validation through clinical specimens to machine learning prediction. The paper clearly establishes the novelty of using EpCAM retention to track disseminating EMT cells and convincingly demonstrates the CD24 specificity requirement. Tables are well-organized but many lack exact quantitative values (e.g., 'High (maintained)' for validation accuracy, 'Very low' for pan-keratin frequencies). The discussion effectively places findings in clinical context. Methods are complete with appropriate controls described.
